name: claude-chat-pane
title: Claude Chat Pane
description: No-sidebar chat pane composed from the shared claude-thread-core (cinematic scale) and claude-composer atoms via runtime/backlot-component-loader.js, poured into the Sonnet 4.6 launch-frame rhythm; the pane owns only its topbar chrome. Claude chat scenes that need just the active topbar, message field, and composer without sidebar, task rail, browser, Finder, Office, Codex, or desktop chrome.
